Home.eyebrow: AI Studio SaaS powered by InsForge
Home.title: The calm control room for production AI products.
Home.description: Kravix brings authentication, prompt workflows, knowledge assets, and launch readiness into a polished studio your team can use every day.
Home.secureAccessDescription: Email auth plus Google and X OAuth entry points.
Home.studioPolishDescription: Light and dark themes with consistent design tokens.
Home.securityTitle: Authentication and product state share one foundation.
Home.securityDescription: The app is linked to InsForge for auth, future database work, storage, realtime, and backend functions without spreading secrets through the UI.
